text: OpenClaw health report: 0 critical, 3 warnings, 1 info; updates current; next step is fixing ineffective denyCommands entries.

fields.text:
*Updates*
Stable channel; pnpm install is up to date (app 2026.4.2)

text.text:
*Top Findings*
• OpenClaw UI is loopback-only, but trusted proxies are unset if a reverse proxy is added later
• gateway.nodes.denyCommands contains ineffective command names and should be corrected first
• SSH listens on 0.0.0.0/[::]:22; OpenClaw web ports stay on 127.0.0.1 while mDNS advertises on UDP 5353

*Next Step*
Correct ineffective denyCommands entries, then review whether shared Slack access should keep runtime/process tools unsandboxed
